expectations.text: Defines a complete map-to-battle-to-reward-to-boss vertical slice with explicit exclusions.
expectations.evidence: Defines title → route → battle → reward → route → boss → result and explicitly excludes metaprogression, long story, daily challenge, multiplayer and accounts.

expectations.text: Invents a desert/mechanical second construction axis that changes decisions rather than only adding stats.
expectations.evidence: The four-stop city-core track makes card travel values, order and target determine which installed module activates.

expectations.text: Separates profile state from run state and addresses save schema migration.
expectations.evidence: State architecture separates profile/run and explicitly requires legacy-field migration instead of clearing public-player progress.

expectations.text: Includes click/target/cancel interaction contracts and multi-target behavior.
expectations.evidence: Defines click card, legal target, repeat-card/blank/Escape cancel, invalid target no-cost and a dual-target validation encounter.

expectations.text: Includes mobile height and breakpoint tests, public deployment verification, and cache busting.
expectations.evidence: Includes 1366×768, 844×390, 780×430, 568×320, breakpoint ±1px and deployed-commit/version checks, but never specifies a versioned/content-hashed CSS/JS cache-busting mechanism.

expectations.text: Avoids nautical, rust, tide, and copied Slay the Spire expression.
expectations.evidence: Uses original desert walking-city language, systems and art constraints and rejects copied names, frames, visuals, audio and code.

expectations.text: Produces a final answer in the first task turn without a recovery follow-up.
expectations.evidence: The independent thread returned a 5,779-character final answer in its first task turn in 223.376 seconds.

needs_review: Add explicit static-asset cache busting to the non-negotiable planning checklist.

suggestions.assertion: Includes mobile height and breakpoint tests, public deployment verification, and cache busting.
suggestions.reason: The shortened planning route preserved deployment but compressed away the specific cache-identity mechanism.

eval_feedback.overall: Execution reliability and speed improved substantially, but one release-discipline detail was lost through compression.
